sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13854" key="a)posthmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-στημᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n13854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">due to an abscess,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.74</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n13854.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at a distance,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐδὲν ἀ. παρεμφαίνουσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:245" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.245</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
